refund_policy.policy_text: No public refund policy found. Froxy terms state usage of proxy for banks/payment systems/government sites is user's responsibility. Contact support for refund requests.

support.hours: Not stated — live chat suggests extended hours
support.response_time: Live chat available — faster than email-only

notes: Decent mid-tier provider. $3/GB resi, 200+ countries, mobile IPs available. Live chat support is differentiator. Trustpilot ~4.0. No public refund policy = risk for resellers. USE WITH CAUTION.
